allow: Bash(node -e "const m=require\('mariadb'\);const c=require\('./config'\);\(async\(\)=>{const conn=await m.createConnection\({host:c.mysql.host,port:c.mysql.port,user:c.mysql.user,password:c.mysql.password,database:c.mysql.database}\);const t=await conn.query\('SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=? AND TABLE_TYPE=\\"BASE TABLE\\" ORDER BY TABLE_NAME',[c.mysql.database]\);console.log\('TABLES:',t.map\(r=>r.TABLE_NAME\).join\(', '\)\);await conn.end\(\);}\)\(\);")

Bash(node -e "let data=''; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>data+=d\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const r=JSON.parse\(data\); console.log\('passes:',r.stats.passes,'failures:',r.stats.failures\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('parse error'\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\('tsc-wide.txt','utf8'\).split\(/\\r?\\n/\).filter\(l=>l.includes\(': error'\) && !l.includes\('node_modules'\)\); console.log\('Sample remaining TS7006:'\); lines.filter\(l=>l.includes\('TS7006'\)\).slice\(0,10\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('  '+l.slice\(0,260\)\)\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('Sample TS7005:'\); lines.filter\(l=>l.includes\('TS7005'\)\).slice\(0,8\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('  '+l.slice\(0,260\)\)\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('Sample TS7034:'\); lines.filter\(l=>l.includes\('TS7034'\)\).slice\(0,6\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('  '+l.slice\(0,260\)\)\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('Sample TS7031:'\); lines.filter\(l=>l.includes\('TS7031'\)\).slice\(0,6\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('  '+l.slice\(0,260\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\('tsc-wide.txt','utf8'\).split\(/\\r?\\n/\).filter\(l=>l.includes\(': error'\) && !l.includes\('node_modules'\)\); console.log\('TS2339 \(75\) sample:'\); lines.filter\(l=>l.includes\('TS2339'\)\).slice\(0,15\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('  '+l.slice\(0,260\)\)\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('TS7005 \(27\) sample:'\); lines.filter\(l=>l.includes\('TS7005'\)\).slice\(0,5\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('  '+l.slice\(0,260\)\)\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('TS7053 \(23\) sample:'\); lines.filter\(l=>l.includes\('TS7053'\)\).slice\(0,5\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('  '+l.slice\(0,260\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\('tsc-wide.txt','utf8'\).split\(/\\r?\\n/\).filter\(l=>l.includes\(': error'\) && !l.includes\('node_modules'\)\); const byCode={}; lines.forEach\(l=>{const m=l.match\(/error \(TS\\d+\):/\); if\(m\){byCode[m[1]]=\(byCode[m[1]]||[]\); byCode[m[1]].push\(l.slice\(0,250\)\)}}\); for \(const code of ['TS2339','TS7005','TS7006','TS7034','TS7053','TS2345','TS2322','TS2554']\){console.log\(code,'samples:'\); \(byCode[code]||[]\).slice\(0,4\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('  '+l\)\); console.log\(''\)}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\('tsc-wide.txt','utf8'\).split\(/\\r?\\n/\).filter\(l=>l.includes\(': error'\) && !l.includes\('node_modules'\)\); console.log\('TS2314 \(11\):'\); lines.filter\(l=>l.includes\('TS2314'\)\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('  '+l.slice\(0,260\)\)\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('TS8032 \(5\):'\); lines.filter\(l=>l.includes\('TS8032'\)\).forEach\(l=>console.log\('  '+l.slice\(0,260\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\('tsc-wide.txt','utf8'\).split\(/\\r?\\n/\).filter\(l=>l.includes\(': error'\) && !l.includes\('node_modules'\)\); const cwd=process.cwd\(\); const byFile={}; lines.forEach\(l=>{const m=l.match\(/^\(.+?\)\\\(\\d+,\\d+\\\):/\); if\(m\){const f=m[1].replace\(cwd+'\\\\\\\\',''\).replace\(/\\\\\\\\/g,'/'\); byFile[f]=\(byFile[f]||0\)+1}}\); console.log\('Files \(top 20\):'\); Object.entries\(byFile\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).slice\(0,20\).forEach\(\([f,n]\)=>console.log\(' ',String\(n\).padStart\(3\),f\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); let c=fs.readFileSync\('tests/unit/auth/auth-middleware.test.js','utf8'\); const orig=c; c=c.replace\(/^\(\\s*\)const request = \\{/gm,'\\$1/** @type {any} */\\n\\$1const request = {'\); c=c.replace\(/^\(\\s*\)const request = \\{ session.*\\};$/gm,m=>m.replace\(/const request/,'/** @type {any} */\\n        const request'\)\); if \(c!==orig\){fs.writeFileSync\('tests/unit/auth/auth-middleware.test.js',c\); console.log\('patched'\)}")
